title: Cranberry Keto Biscuit
description: A keto-friendly biscuit made with butter and cranberries, perfect for a low-carb dessert or snack.
instructions: Roll out the keto-friendly roll to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Cut out a circle of dough using a biscuit cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place the dough circle on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Melt the butter and brush it evenly over the dough circle.
Sprinkle the cranberries over the dough circle.
Fold the dough in half over the cranberries and press the edges to seal.
Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
